data.title: 国际服4.5周年更新介绍视频公开
data.summary: Happy 4.5-year anniversary, Sensei! CM Arcie + May 2026 Update = All the intel you’ve been waiting f
data.body:
Happy 4.5-year anniversary, Sensei!
CM Arcie + May 2026 Update = All the intel you’ve been waiting for. Let’s go!📺
 
➡️ To be released on YouTube: 5/15 (Fri) 9:30 AM (UTC): https://youtu.be/TCBl11xNWpM
